eol_details.migration_strategy: For N9K-C93180LC-EX product, customers are encouraged to migrate to the Cisco Nexus 9336C-FX2 Switch. Information about these products can be found at: https://www.cisco.com/c/en/us/products/switches/nexus-9000-series-switches/datasheet-listing.html.

Cisco ONS 15454 MSTP and NCS 2000 networks can be migrated to latest software versions of Release 10.5 and 10.6 for TCC2P based deployments, Release 10.6 and above for TNC, TNC-E, TSC, TSC-E, TNCS, TNCS-O based deployments, Release 11.0 and above for TNCS2 and TNCS2O based deployments.
